{{ .APIName }}

{{if .Calls}}
Calls
{{range $name, $_ := .Calls}} {{$name}} {{end}}
{{end}} {{if .Topics}}
Topics
{{range $name, $_ := .Topics}} {{$name}} {{end}}
{{end}}
{{/* ── MAIN ── */}}
{{/* ── HERO ── */}}
API Documentation

{{ .APIName }}

{{.APIDescr}}

This is a Misirka-based API that is available over multiple protocols.

{{/* ── CALLS ── */}} {{if .Calls}}

Calls

{{range $name, $call := .Calls}}
call
{{$name}}
{{if $call.Description}}
{{$call.Description}}
{{end}}
{{if $call.PathValueAliases}}
Aliases {{range $call.PathValueAliases}} {{.}} {{end}}
{{end}} {{if $call.ExampleCalls}}
Examples
{{range $i, $ex := $call.ExampleCalls}}
Param
{{$ex.Param | jsonify}}
Result
{{$ex.Result | jsonify}}
{{end}}
{{else}} No examples provided. {{end}}
{{end}}
{{end}} {{/* ── TOPICS ── */}} {{if .Topics}}

Topics

{{range $name, $topic := .Topics}}
topic
{{$name}}
{{if $topic.Description}}
{{$topic.Description}}
{{end}}
{{if $topic.Examples}}
Examples
{{range $topic.Examples}} 
{{. | jsonify}}
{{end}}
{{end}}
{{end}}
{{end}}
Generated API documentation — {{len .Calls}} call{{if ne (len .Calls) 1}}s{{end}}, {{len .Topics}} topic{{if ne (len .Topics) 1}}s{{end}}
